title: voacanga thouarsii var. dregei
intro: Voacanga thouarsii var. dregei, also known as the African Voacanga, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its psychoactive and stimulant effects, which are attributed to the presence of voacangine, a tryptamine alkaloid. The health benefits of Voacanga thouarsii var. dregei include its potential to improve cognitive function, increase energy levels, and enhance overall mental well-being. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal supplement or extract, and its preparations are available in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and powders.
